CommunityDescription: Join the community and follow our journey.
ContactTeamTitle: Who will reply to your question?
Description: Meet the team behind Bondery and learn why we built it.
FoundersPhotoAlt: Marek and Martin at a hackathon
HeroLead: Bondery helps you keep meaningful relationships active, intentional, and easy to maintain.
HeroTitle: We are building a better way to stay close to people who matter.
Intro: We are the team behind Bondery: We help you build a better personal network.
MissionBody: We are building a calm, trustworthy relationship workspace that helps people stay in touch with intention over the long term.
PeopleSubtitle: We are building tools that help people nurture meaningful relationships with intention.
PrincipleConsistencyDescription: Consistent, lightweight follow-ups create stronger long-term bonds.
PrinciplePeopleDescription: We design for genuine relationships, not contact volume.
PrinciplesIntro: From product design to infrastructure, these principles guide how we build Bondery.
PrincipleTrustDescription: Your data should remain yours and be handled with transparency.
Story: We created Bondery because we were unsatisfied with current tools to manage our most valuable resource: our networks and bonds. Either they were too focused on sales or we didn't know what was happening to our data.
StoryBody: Bondery started from a simple frustration: relationship tools either felt transactional or made us compromise on privacy and ownership.
Title: About us
